programme.title: CNBC Sports - Uim F1H2O World Championship
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O World Championship is the world's foremost international series of single-seater inshore circuit powerboat racing. Highly competitive, intensely challenging, risky and entertaining, inshore circuit powerboat racing is the ultimate adrenalin rush and regarded as one of the most spectacular and exciting sports in the world.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The Score

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: Neighbor's Nurturing Session 'After The Parent-Child Conflict'
programme.desc: The program is for parents raising children from elementary to junior high school ages. Parenting problems are difficult to talk to Mom/Dad friends, but they can be serious problems for those involved. Sharing sympathetic voices and ideas gathered from parenting families across the country, we work together to find solutions.

programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: The World With Yalda Hakim
programme.desc: Eyewitness reports, interviews and analysis on the big stories around the world with Yalda Hakim.

programme.title: E3 - Captain Twinkletoes
programme.desc: The pirates are visited by Captain Captain's arch rival from Strictly Come Pirating, Captain Twinkletoes. Captain Captain is unaware of his forthcoming arrival.

programme.title: E16 - The Great Battery Rescue
programme.desc: Raccoon and Scooter are playing a fun pirate game. Suddenly Rori begins acting weird.

programme.title: E5 - Desserts Of Destiny
programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E16 - Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E88 - Listen
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: E32 - Frightful Friend
programme.desc: Plom is having a spooky sleepover for his friends at his house. But when Zip gets scared and decides to stay home, Plom tries to show him that scary things can sometimes be fun things too.

programme.title: E17 - Ice Ice Messy
programme.desc: Messy's new friend is in a spot of hot bother! They go on an icy adventure to the South Pole, the desert and the mountains to help.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E13 - It's Time To Find A Dinosaur
programme.desc: After playing with her toy dinosaurs, JoJo decides she would love to see a real one. Gran Gran takes JoJo to the museum to see a fossilised skeleton of a Tyrannosaurus rex!

programme.title: E1 - Free The Roads
programme.desc: Bulgy thinks that people should travel by bus instead of rail, that is until he tries carrying all their passengers.

programme.title: E20 - Markets
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: E6 - The Library Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea...

programme.title: E8 - Venice, Italy
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: E9 - Seattle Space Needle, USA
programme.desc: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space.

programme.desc: The pirates are visited by Captain Captain's arch rival from Strictly Come Pirating, Captain Twinkletoes. Captain Captain is unaware of his forthcoming arrival.

programme.title: E13 - It's Time To Find A Dinosaur
programme.desc: After playing with her toy dinosaurs, JoJo decides she would love to see a real one. Gran Gran takes JoJo to the museum to see a fossilised skeleton of a Tyrannosaurus rex!

programme.title: E1 - Free The Roads
programme.desc: Bulgy thinks that people should travel by bus instead of rail, that is until he tries carrying all their passengers.

programme.title: E20 - Markets
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: E6 - The Library Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea...

programme.title: E8 - Venice, Italy
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: E9 - Seattle Space Needle, USA
programme.desc: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space.

programme.title: E3 - Captain Twinkletoes
programme.desc: The pirates are visited by Captain Captain's arch rival from Strictly Come Pirating, Captain Twinkletoes. Captain Captain is unaware of his forthcoming arrival.

programme.title: E16 - The Great Battery Rescue
programme.desc: Raccoon and Scooter are playing a fun pirate game. Suddenly Rori begins acting weird.

programme.title: E5 - Desserts Of Destiny
programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E10 - Donkey
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'donkey' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a furry donkey, a nosy donkey and even meet a dressed-up donkey.

programme.title: E26 - Slippery Messy
programme.desc: OKIDO is covered in ice, and Messy must find a way to melt it before it's too late.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E8 - The Kite Badge
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: E6 - The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: E3 - Heart Of Gold
programme.desc: Toby's passengers can't stop making fun of him, that is until he discovers two villains trying to steal King Godred's crown.

programme.title: E20 - Heavy
programme.desc: Stanley and Morris put too many boxes on the barge and now one end is sinking and the other is lifting up. Stanley get's the townsfolk to help level it out.

programme.title: E19 - Painting
programme.desc: Stanley goes to help Myrtle, who has found a paint smudge on the Town Hall's door!

programme.title: E30 - It's Time To Write A Book
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are at the library trying to find a new Captain Chloe book, but it seems that she's read them all. JoJo asks Terrence the librarian if there's a book about Captain Chloe and pandas.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E34 - The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E8 - Terry vs Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet. We partner with Star Trek: Original Series set tour in New York, as we test the reality of making gunpowder by hand without actually blowing yourself up.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

programme.title: E3 - Rifle vs. Drone
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the ATI Tracking Rifle versus the Sky Jib 8 octocopter; The the Blunt Umbrella versus the Buffalo Turbine Mega Blower; and EverSTIK adhesive versus the Coe M7 tree-shaker.

programme.title: E1 - Bangkok
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: E530 - Sudden Impact
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a late-night meeting spins out of control, leaving a young father dead, his friend critically injured, and their SUV crashed through a child's bedroom.

programme.title: E3 - Cold Blooded Killer Or Terrified Shooter?
programme.desc: A peaceful Sunday morning ends in tragedy when a car accident ends in a deadly altercation. A 25-year old man is charged with second-degree murder after he shoots a teenage driver dead.

programme.title: E3 - Cristhian Bahena Rivera
programme.desc: When a young college student disappears on her evening run, investigators scour her small town searching for her. And when her accused attacker, Cristhian Bahena Rivera takes the stand.

programme.title: E10 - Dead Wrong
programme.desc: After being pursued by handsome Kevin Lewis, Amanda can't wait to marry her new man. But on their honeymoon, Amanda discovers a different side to Kevin — he likes things done a certain way.

programme.title: E3 - Small Towns, Big Crimes
programme.desc: Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: A young woman is brutally attacked on the train by an assailant; a coach witnesses a student with a gun roam the hall; a store clerk faces a suspect trying to rob him with an unusual weapon.

programme.title: E5 - Caught In The App
programme.desc: Detectives gather crucial information about a double-homicide from neighbourhood surveillance footage, but they're not able to identify and track the killer until some key digital data is uncovered.

programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E852 - The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: E503 - Basketball
programme.desc: Daddy teaches the kids how to play basketball, and it is not long before they are good enough to take on a team.

programme.desc: Peppa and George realize that they have shadows and no matter what they do, they can't escape from them.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Marvel at the clever ways predators use cunning, agility, and breakneck speed when taking down prey. Witness luring behaviours and see how some killers hide in plain sight, while others put weaponry or chemical warfare to work to bring dinner home.

programme.title: E2 - Otago Peninsula/ Muaupoko
programme.desc: Set sail for New Zealand’s Otago Peninsula, a breeding refuge for endangered seabirds and marine mammals. Watch as sea lions, albatrosses, red-billed gulls, white-fronted terns, and fairy prions find mates, then nurture the next generation.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Marvel at the clever ways predators use cunning, agility, and breakneck speed when taking down prey. Witness luring behaviours and see how some killers hide in plain sight, while others put weaponry or chemical warfare to work to bring dinner home.

programme.desc: Set sail for New Zealand’s Otago Peninsula, a breeding refuge for endangered seabirds and marine mammals. Watch as sea lions, albatrosses, red-billed gulls, white-fronted terns, and fairy prions find mates, then nurture the next generation.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E1 - Kimba's Rise
programme.desc: While the dominant males roam nearby territories, hunting duties fall to the Mwamba pride’s nine strong lionesses. See how they cope with the approach of the rainy season and six growing teenagers with boundless appetites.

programme.title: E2 - Prides and Prejudice
programme.desc: As the lionesses set out to recover the males who are needed to hunt buffalo, they must cross a crocodile-infested river. Follow Milo, the only cub in the mighty Mwamba pride, as he’s saved from snapping jaws and cements the family’s future.

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Marvel at the clever ways predators use cunning, agility, and breakneck speed when taking down prey. Witness luring behaviours and see how some killers hide in plain sight, while others put weaponry or chemical warfare to work to bring dinner home.

programme.title: E11 - Dogs And Raindrops, Part 1
programme.desc: Kanshi saves Keigo from a bully using a candy called 'Drop.' They learn that a man named Wolf is distributing it.

programme.title: E12 - Dogs And Raindrops, Part 2
programme.desc: Keigo Magami is revealed as Wolf and isolates Morihito for battle, while Nico and Kanshi target the witch and his Dogs.

programme.title: E10 - I'll Definitely Be Hurt Someday
programme.desc: Yamada looks after Akane when she has a bad cold. At the same time, Tsubaki reflects on her feelings for Yamada.

programme.title: E11 - There's Something I Want To Talk To You About
programme.desc: Akane recovers from the cold after Yamada looks after her, and she goes hunting with the new member, TSUBAKI, in FOS.

programme.title: E12 - I Like You
programme.desc: Akane decides to confess her feelings to Yamada, but Yamada has to hurry to cram school and cannot listen to her.

programme.title: E6 - Perhaps We Should Invite Ourselves Over
programme.desc: Yuki causes a stir with his outfit during the school festival, and Tohru encounters the mysterious little boy again.

programme.title: E7 - Spring Comes
programme.desc: Tohru is summoned to the Soma family estate, where she is advised by Hatori to stop associating with the Soma clan.

programme.title: E8 - See You When You Get Back
programme.desc: Tohru declines Arisa and Saki's invite to spend New Year's Eve with them, even when she has no family to celebrate with.

Reporters
programme.desc: Reporters presents various reports by team of correspondents from all over the world regarding hot button issues. Directly from the suburbs of Ghana's capital Accra or from Chile, Israel or USA, from any place of the globe the reporters tell latest stories and highlight what is going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Fun Day at School!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for a fun day at school! First, he learns that karate can be challenging, but with a lot of practice, he learns how to kick, punch & move! Then, he learns how to play soccer with the help of his big brother & sister. The day continues with a special surprise guest who drops in & teaches the gang how to play different instruments, like the piano, trumpet & guitar! It's always a fun day of learning at school!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E227 - The Giants Of Malta
programme.desc: Enormous, megalithic structures of mysterious origins. Could the ancient mysteries that exist on the Mediterranean islands of Malta be connected to local legends of alien visitation and hybrid beings?

programme.title: E10 - Who Killed King Tut?
programme.desc: The death of one of history's most enigmatic rulers-Egypt's King Tutankhamun-remains unsolved. No one knows what ended his life, but scientific advancements may be getting us closer to the answer.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: When it’s time for the annual Bundy vacation, Al vetoes Hawaii in favor of scenic Dumpwater, Florida, only to discover that there is a tourist-bating ax-murderer on the loose.

programme.desc: A beautiful actress becomes the prime suspect in the murder of her tyrannical husband - except that she has a cast-iron alibi for the night of the crime.

programme.title: First Option
programme.desc: Wong and his team are forced to team up with a bungling customs squad and their greenhorn leader, who happens to be a woman, to bring in a huge shipment of heroine...

programme.title: Deadly Dream Woman
programme.desc: Wong Ngung wants to help her adoptive father Yip Lei-yam to eradicate Lui Pao, an evildoer in the gang. But Lui Pao forestalls them; Yip and his daughter Mocking Bird are killed, and Wong loses her memory by a big hit. A sorceress and a girl Ah Ching save her. The two women think that Wong is a rich girl, so they treat her very well and hope for repayment. Ah Ching is in love with Ah Kat, a car-repairing worker. Her mother opposes it. Her mother also bears a great debt because of gambling..

programme.title: Story Of Kennedy Town
programme.desc: The rough and tough Kennedy Town. And three young men, Chiang, Peng and Wei, came to the scene. Chiang and Wei help Peng to become a policeman. Chiang and Wei also provide the information which enables Peng to crack a few cases. Then Chiang and Wei kill a gangster by accident. Chiang decides to surrender himself to Peng and jail. Peng, however, takes over Chiang's girlfriend. Chiang comes out from jail, Peng plots to get rid of all gangland chief, Chiang and Wei inclusive...

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: Police officer Jackie is the hero in a police crackdown on drug king Chee. But Chee is set free on lack of evidence while Jackie is demoted. Chee, however, wants Jackie dead....

programme.title: MAN WANTED 3
programme.desc: Street boy Qian Jidong had been idolizing Pujun, one of the 'Double Eagles in Mong Kok' since childhood. His father was beaten because he owed Xiyang a loan, so Qian Jidong went to Xiyang desperately, but was captured by Xiyang. At a critical moment, Pujun appeared and saved his life. Then, Qian Jidong worked for Pujun. But Qian Jidong's girlfriend GIGI did not like him working in the underworld and finally broke up with him...

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: Police officer Jackie is the hero in a police crackdown on drug king Chee. But Chee is set free on lack of evidence while Jackie is demoted. Chee, however, wants Jackie dead....

programme.title: E2 - Ground Meats
programme.desc: Quebec's culinary heritage wouldn't be the same without ground meat. To honor this often-misunderstood ingredient, we invite Nathalie Simard, Jean-Sebastien Girard, and chefs Marc Maula and Amine Laabi.

programme.title: E4 - Mathieu Bassee At Studio Mtx/Chloe Valorso
programme.desc: Pissarro-Pontoise Art and History Museum displays the impressionist master's works. Mathieu Bassee and the team at Studio MTX are inspired by materials to embroider space. Miu Miu mixes genders and breaks codes. Sculptor and jewellery designer Chloe Valorso creates dreamlike objects inspired by animals, plants and minerals.

programme.title: E12 - Chicken With Tarragon And Ratatouille
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Mauricette Jacquet, a hyperactive pensioner, former postman and fine cook. She's here to pass on her tips and experience with a simple, gourmet recipe: tarragon chicken served with ratatouille flavoured with ras el-hanout.

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E4 - Mathieu Bassee At Studio Mtx/Chloe Valorso
programme.desc: Pissarro-Pontoise Art and History Museum displays the impressionist master's works. Mathieu Bassee and the team at Studio MTX are inspired by materials to embroider space. Miu Miu mixes genders and breaks codes. Sculptor and jewellery designer Chloe Valorso creates dreamlike objects inspired by animals, plants and minerals.

programme.title: E1 - Frozen In Time
programme.desc: Audre?e lives in an 18th-century country house that has remained intact. On Nuns' Island, the service station designed by Ludwig Mies van der Rohe is a jewel of modern architecture. And gold leaves hold no secrets for Marie-France Kech

programme.title: E9 - Ardeche: 20,000 Leagues Under The Caves
programme.desc: Loic Ballet delves into the underground of Ardeche. Underground, you can sleep in a guest room and even taste bottles aged in the unique atmosphere of the Saint-Marcel Cave.

programme.title: E10 - Esteban Salazar
programme.desc: Chef Esteban Salazar, originally from Colombia, draws inspiration from his home country and numerous travels. On today's menu: red tuna crusted with cocoa nibs, served with white rice cooked in coconut milk.

programme.title: E1 - Triumph Dolomite Sprint
programme.desc: It's the 50th anniversary of one of British motoring's forgotten heroes, the Triumph Dolomite Sprint. So, of course, Mike and Elvis have to get one.

programme.title: E2 - Kodiak Sea Monster
programme.desc: An unknown apex predator is preying on orcas off the frozen coast of Kodiak, Alaska. Can the team identify the monster before it strikes again?

programme.title: E3 - Terror On The Interstate
programme.desc: A chase through a Florida town ends with a shock for pursuing deputies. Officers put themselves in danger to pursue a burning car in Illinois.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Shark Week: Cocaine Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

programme.title: E2 - Brazilian Gold
programme.desc: Parker reveals new aspects of the Brazilian trail, from illegal gold dredges to a billion-dollar opportunity.

programme.title: Shark Week: Cocaine Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

programme.title: E2 - Brazilian Gold
programme.desc: Parker reveals new aspects of the Brazilian trail, from illegal gold dredges to a billion-dollar opportunity.

programme.title: Shark Week: Cocaine Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

programme.title: Shark Week: Cocaine Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

programme.title: E2 - Kodiak Sea Monster
programme.desc: An unknown apex predator is preying on orcas off the frozen coast of Kodiak, Alaska. Can the team identify the monster before it strikes again?

programme.title: E1 - Triumph Dolomite Sprint
programme.desc: It's the 50th anniversary of one of British motoring's forgotten heroes, the Triumph Dolomite Sprint. So, of course, Mike and Elvis have to get one.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 4: Hunters of the Deep
programme.desc: A group of young explorers are on a search for the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa. Today they are on the trail of a Great White Shark. From the research boat they spot a massive five-meter shark, one of the biggest ever seen at Bird Island.

programme.title: The Sunken Gallery
programme.desc: The Nektons are arrested for stealing! Someone set them up. Ant and Fontaine escape to prove their innocence.

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: Big Fat Mistery
programme.desc: The kids dive into the mystery of how the ravens have become so fat, and discover a surprising clue!

programme.title: Sail Car
programme.desc: How do you make a wind powered wonder wagon? You'll need a paper cup and the power of puff.

programme.title: Cell Down
programme.desc: When Kaylyn gets the team an invite to pitch an idea on a popular tv show, Max and Alicia invent an app that limits phone use while Noodles and Zeke build a 'Smart Belt'.

programme.title: Broken
programme.desc: It's not good news for Chase, who heads to the hospital after suffering an injury at the gym and has a nervous wait to find out how long he'll be out of action. And Acro duo Dylan and Lola join the Acro squad for their first big international competition in Portugal.

programme.title: The Power of Air
programme.desc: Host Steve Spangler shows how to build our own automatic toilet paper launcher, using the same science principles that keep an airplane in the air. He also shows how we can create our own smoke ring bazooka and ping pong ball launcher.

programme.title: Pick a Block of Dates - Any Block
programme.desc: This episode introduces the mathematical mean: the number you get when you add up all numbers and divide them by the number of numbers. Eric presents a trick you can do by calculating the sum of a 3-by-3 block of dates on a calendar without using a calculator.

programme.title: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Ice dancer Josh has a new partner, Lucy, but they have just weeks to pull off their first public performance. Ice hockey player Rais receives an offer he can't refuse, and figure skaters Josh and Kloe are preparing for a big international competition.

programme.title: It's Snow Time!
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh, Kloe, and Beccy pack their bags and head to Latvia for an important international competition. But it's not all snowball fights and fun. Josh is moving into the senior category and has decided to attempt a new jump.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Sail Car
programme.desc: How do you make a wind powered wonder wagon? You'll need a paper cup and the power of puff.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Milo doesn't know what to do with his old broken skateboard. Zoe thinks it is useless, so it just needs to be thrown away, but Alim thinks otherwise. He knows that his friend Baidi can recycle anything and everything. Off they go to Senegal to meet Baidi!

programme.title: Curacao
programme.desc: Nicole joins local teens Skyler and Diego in Curacao for a thrilling adventure: submarine dive, flyboarding, paddleboarding, and golf!

programme.title: Hive Got A Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts follow a bee to learn why it is visiting flowers, and when the hive gets disturbed, they build a new beehive for Heni's garden.

programme.title: Eric Makes Wind
programme.desc: Eric learns that an anemometer – an instrument to measure wind speed – is important for sailors and for pilots. Then he learns how to make one himself.

programme.title: Fun with Pressure and Hydraulics
programme.desc: How come does a lift operate as a hydraulic system? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of pressure. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with leakages, and get to know Blaise Pascal, a polymath, who pioneered research into the hydrostatic principle.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Eric Makes Wind
programme.desc: Eric learns that an anemometer – an instrument to measure wind speed – is important for sailors and for pilots. Then he learns how to make one himself.

programme.title: Broken
programme.desc: It's not good news for Chase, who heads to the hospital after suffering an injury at the gym and has a nervous wait to find out how long he'll be out of action. And Acro duo Dylan and Lola join the Acro squad for their first big international competition in Portugal.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: Chasing the Sun
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts try to find out where the Sun goes when it sets and learn what is really happening when the Sun “moves” across the sky.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

E2 - Bourbon, Barrels And Burgoo
programme.desc: A very pregnant Gail Simmons asks the chefs to feed her cravings in a special Quickfire delivery. Then it’s time to celebrate two iconic Kentucky mainstays: local cuisine and bourbon. The Chefs head to Makers Mark, the oldest distillery in America to put their spins on a meal full of Kentucky classics including burgoo, Benedictine, mutton, hoe cakes and dumplings. This is a true battle for Kentucky as the chefs navigate their first team challenge – and one chef makes a potentially fatal shopping error. Can they recover or will they be scraping the bottom of the barrel to make it through? Food and travel editor, Nilou Motamed joins the judges this season, and Maker’s Mark’s in-house Chef, Newman Miller, sits on the panel as a guest judge.

programme.title: Serie A Club Classic Archive E64 -Juventus vs Roma - 2017/18
E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11 - 王牌荒島生存大賽
programme.desc: 每期圍繞一個主題，邀請兩支王牌團隊，兩位隊長各帶領嘉賓進行對戰，通過才藝比拼、遊戲競技，決出王牌中的王牌；「王牌家族」沈騰、華晨宇、關曉彤、宋亞軒、沈濤已就位，歡樂派對即將開場，還有「王牌好友」楊迪、沙溢、唐嫣驚喜赴約，一起點燃快樂！

programme.title: E9 - 男女對唱演繹愛的訣別
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E9 - 男女對唱演繹愛的訣別
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E129
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E150
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.
PHOENIX FOCUS : Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E165
programme.desc: Phoenix Satellite TV creates a brand-new Greater Bay Area magazine-style column 'GBA Discovery' with a total duration of 26 minutes. programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 1. The King's Residence, Changdeokgung 2. The Secret Garden of Changdeokgung 3. The Secret of the Volcanic Island 4. Forest of the Stone Buddha 5. Harmony of the Heaven and Earth, Hawking 6. The Underwater Palace, Daryeodo 7. Scholar's Waterway, Hahoe Folk Village 8. A Worship for the King, Gwangneung Forest

programme.title: E319
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.
